__warnings.note: Phase names translated functionally ('Hook' → 'シーン', 'Chunks' → '新しい言葉', 'Pattern' → 'パターン', etc.). The English originals are SLA-research labels — reviewer: confirm whether Japanese learners recognise them better translated, or whether keeping katakana loanwords (e.g. フック, パターン) feels more on-brand.
'Famba zvakanaka' is Shona ('travel well / go in peace'). Kept verbatim as Rwen's brand signature, like Mhoro. Reviewer: confirm consistency with rwen.json.
Mentions 'Modules 5-10' and 'Text AI tier' — UI labels kept consistent. Verify wording when subscription tier names settle in Japanese.
'2-minute conversation' rendered as '2分間の会話'. Reviewer: confirm natural flow.
'Type your answer...' → '答えを入力してください…'. Polite-form maintained.
'{{lang}} curriculum coming soon' → '{{lang}}のカリキュラムは近日公開'. Japanese has no gender — straightforward.
Used polite-form (です／ます) throughout. Reviewer: confirm tone matches app voice across all 5 locale files.
